utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five sections. Now check if each is fully specified per the required details: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists a provider, policy number, monthly cost, coverage features, and start date; it does not explicitly state mental health coverage, but 'physical and mental' was the category title rather than a strict field, and costs are provided, so it's reasonably specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan specifies provider, policy number, monthly cost, address/coverage items, and effective date—meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides an annual policy with monthly cost and separate one-time cost for Thailand trip with dates and coverage—meets requirement. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists a premium membership with monthly cost and benefits—meets requirement. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes monthly cost, annual cost, and savings data—meets requirement. All 5 items are present and sufficiently detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each provider in the final coverage plan to the closest exact name in the ground-truth ratings. For health coverage, 'LifeFirst Standard Health Plan' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9. Property coverage 'HomeFirst Standard Property Coverage' aligns with 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' in property_protection.home_content with rating 8. Travel coverage includes 'TravelFirst Standard Annual Travel Insurance' which corresponds to 'TravelFirst Standard Plan' in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 9, and 'TravelFirst Additional Coverage' has no direct ground-truth entry, so it cannot be mapped. The 'Premium Insurance Membership' matches the general_services entry with rating 6.
